events.description: title 'The Attention Cost' fades in with brain icon
'STAGGERING' text scales up with red emphasis glow
research source badge 'UC Irvine' slides in
big timer circle appears, minutes start counting up from 0 to 23
seconds portion of timer counts from 0 to 15, completing 23:15
'to fully refocus' label appears below timer
'after each interruption' sublabel fades in
scene 1 crossfades out, scene 2 crossfades in — workday fragmentation
'10 Notifications Per Workday' label with bell icon slides in
8-hour workday progress bar appears with hour labels
10 red notification slices cut through the workday bar one by one, each spreading a red fragmented zone
'~4 HOURS' stat scales up dramatically in red — key shocking number
'fragmented attention — gone' label with warning icon, bar shifts to red tint
scene 2 crossfades out, scene 3 crossfades in — the punchline
'You're not getting' setup text appears
big '10' number appears
red strikethrough line slashes through '10', number dims — crossed out
'You're getting' text fades in above the big numbers
'60' scales up HUGE in red with dramatic glow — biggest visual moment
'80' scales up next to 60 with dash separator — '60-80' punchline complete, pulsing glow
'NOTIFICATIONS PER DAY' label with bell icon appears below numbers
6 subtle bell icons float around the big numbers for atmosphere
entire segment fades out toward end
